inclusion: Proposes, evaluates, or analyzes sparse autoencoders for neural network interpretability
Discusses learned features, dictionary elements, monosemanticity, superposition, or feature extraction from neural activations
Contains empirical or conceptual evidence relevant to mechanistic interpretability
exclusion: Mentions autoencoders only as a generic representation learning method
Does not involve neural network interpretability or model analysis
Is primarily about compression, denoising, or generative modeling without interpretability relevance
